headline: Global Industrial Process Heating Market to Hit USD 17.47 Billion by 2032
summary: The global industrial process heating market is set to grow from USD 13.36 billion in 2026 to USD 17.47 billion by 2032, boasting a 4.6% CAGR. As industries including metals, chemicals, and food & beverage push for energy-efficient, low-emission heating systems, the adoption of advanced technologies like electric and gas-powered heating accelerates. Key drivers for growth include burner advancements, smart control systems, and digital monitoring enhancing energy efficiency and process reliabilit
